title: I am trying to link my inventory to my order board, so that a new order updates inventory automatically
excerpt:
I have a simple procedure, and should be easy. My inventory is one item, what i am looking to do is update my inventory board total every time a new order is placed in my order form/board. 
I have tried a few things, but…

posts.author: The_Printed_Foot (Bryan Kentner)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a simple procedure, and should be easy. My inventory is one item, what i am looking to do is update my inventory board total every time a new order is placed in my order form/board.

I have tried a few things, but alas nothing that works… yes I am a novice, yes I put up a request in fiverr and paid someone to not complete this task… so please take pity on a start up with no budget and point me in the right direction

posts.author: lwatkins31 (Lee Watkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bryan, yes you can do this by using match automations. I have set up two boards to do exactly this - please see screenshots below.

Screenshot 2024-05-01 at 13.54.571274×962 56.4 KB

Screenshot 2024-05-01 at 13.54.492718×740 180 KB

Screenshot 2024-05-01 at 13.54.291226×498 23.9 KB

Screenshot 2024-05-01 at 13.53.512582×764 99.1 KB

posts.author: lwatkins31 (Lee Watkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Apologies, looks like the screenshots uploaded a bit wonky. I have one board “Order requests” and another board “Inventory Stats.” “Order Requests” has an automation as follows:

When status “Ready to Ship” changes, connect the item where status “Inventory” matches status “Inventory” in “Inventory Stats” by adding new matched item.

Screenshot 2024-05-01 at 13.58.081358×494 24 KB

Once the connection has been made, the formula in “Inventory Stats” subtracts the number of ordered items from the number of items originally stocked. Hope that helps!

posts.author: The_Printed_Foot (Bryan Kentner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for this!!!

I will give it a go and let you know how i make out!
